LanguageData.Outpost_Factory.description: Places a temporary, autonomously-led factory that specializes in production and fabrication of goods using machines based on mechanoid technology. As with the machines nor商场y, a wide variety of goods can be produced. Once an ample amount is produced, a delivery will be made at the outskirts of a faction's primary colony.
LanguageData.Outpost_Factory.label: factory outpost
